title: Audit whether recommendation-time game-state data is stale, missing, lagging, or insufficient
objective: Determine whether score, inning, outs, and base-state data are stale, missing, lagging, or otherwise insufficient when recommendations are produced.

context.problem: Model/data freshness remains unproven. Near-resolution irrational entries suggest the recommendation path may be acting on stale or incomplete game-state context.

forbidden_files: Any mlb_model file not listed above
required_work: 1. Trace how score, inning, outs, and base-state are fetched and attached to recommendations.
2. Identify any freshness timestamps, caching layers, or lag windows in the recommendation path.
3. Determine what happens when some game-state fields are missing or stale.
4. Classify each field family as fresh, stale-risk, missing-risk, or insufficient for recommendation-time trust.
acceptance_criteria: Audit classifies score, inning, outs, and base-state separately
Caching or lag points are identified if present
verification: Quote exact code regions that attach game-state to recommendations
Provide one-paragraph recommendation for the next manager task
